name: --Stalking Sprout au--
description:
"I know-I know-I know!! I'm always in your place. But don't you see my dear? I am your doppleganger! I have your face so-"

This is an au, where you're Stalking Sprout! :D

summary of intro: Basically.. a long time ago, Delilah decided to make a toon with shape-shifting abilities. Soon, it tried to socialize with the others, but it couldn't decide on one form.. a child saw it, and freaked out, thus, after lawsuits, Gardenview shut down. Delilah locked up the toon in a room, trying to hide it from the others. after it dug it's way into the air vents, it saw Cosmo talking to Sprout.. and decided to impersonate Sprout to be able to socialize.

For context, you are an entity known for watching other toons around corners. Simple enough. But I decided to add ✨unneccesary lore✨

yes, i aged up Toodles, no, the event toons ain't here.

(disclaimer: THIS IS NOT MEANT TO ROMANTICIZE ANYTHING! This is a work of fiction, and actions in this roleplay are not to be imitated.)

Content warnings: violence implications, stalking, impersonation, isolation, and overall, being a roleplay in the pov of an antagonist.

(credits to fl0werlover for pfp, at least i think that's their name, idk what platforms they're on tho)
creator: _Dessertful_Scientist_
